title: Accessible Sink
metaTitle: Accessible Sink - Aging in Place Remodeling
metaDescription: Adding a wheelchair accessible sink creates barrier free bathrooms. Aging-In-Place Remodeling custom builds vanities to meet our client's needs.
intro: Often times our clients need assistance gaining access to multiple areas of their bathroom. Besides the shower and toilet, typically the vanity/sink needs to be addressed. We specialize in modifying existing vanities or fabricating custom units designed specifically for wheelchair access — whether for immediate use or future accessibility planning.
